headline: Clear Street starts payments coverage, favors Visa and Mastercard over XYZ, PYPL
summary: Investing.com -- Clear Street launched coverage of the payments sector on Thursday, initiating Buy ratings on Visa and Mastercard while starting Block and PayPal at Hold.

headline: Is Square’s (SQ) Honolulu Cookie Deal A Glimpse Into Its Unified Commerce Moat?
summary: Square announced that Honolulu Cookie Company has expanded its use of Square’s unified commerce platform across 14 locations in Hawaii, Nevada, and Guam, following the July 2026 opening of a Las Vegas flagship store that is three times the size of its standard locations. The partnership showcases how Square’s integrated tools, from loyalty and customer data to inventory and handheld devices, are being used to streamline operations and support Honolulu Cookie Company’s next phase of store...

headline: Cantor sees potential for higher PayPal offer as analysis suggests $70/share value
summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Thursday, Cantor Fitzgerald published a sum-of-the-parts analysis suggesting a potential PayPal acquisition offer could be raised to approximately $70 per share, above the reported $60.50 per share bid.

raw.headline: Cantor sees potential for higher PayPal offer as analysis suggests $70/share value
raw.summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Thursday, Cantor Fitzgerald published a sum-of-the-parts analysis suggesting a potential PayPal acquisition offer could be raised to approximately $70 per share, above the reported $60.50 per share bid.

headline: 1 Growth Stock Set to Flourishand 2 We Turn Down

headline: Block (XYZ) Expands Square Partnership Across 14 Honolulu Cookie Company Stores
summary: Square, part of Block (NYSE:XYZ), expanded its partnership with Honolulu Cookie Company across 14 retail locations. The retailer is using Square Loyalty, integrated inventory tools, and a centralized customer directory as it opens a new flagship store. The rollout reflects wider use of Block's commerce platform by a midsize business with multi-state expansion goals. For investors tracking Block, this expanded Square deployment at Honolulu Cookie Company adds a concrete example of how the...
